statement.en: Reactive oxygen species from indoor sources and their mixtures : Real-time measurements

proposer: Aneta Wierzbicka, Jonas Enarsson, Axel Eriksson et al.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Paper describes empirical measurement methodology for reactive oxygen species (ROS) from indoor sources with real-time instrumentation. The core claims are testable but the work is dated 2026 (future date, suggesting preprint/provisional status). Mixture interactions and ROS behavior under dynamic indoor conditions involve complex chemistry with partial theoretical understanding and ongoing experimental validation. Not yet a proven theorem, but empirically grounded rather than speculative.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 室内の酸化種は、同時生成と消滅の競合する流れとして現れる。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 複数の光子源が中心の活性酸素へ同時に収束し、瞬間的な化学的舞踏を描く。
